results.title: Genuine Parts Company AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Genuine Parts Company (GPC) has strategically positioned itself as a technology-enabled distributor in the automotive and industrial parts sector, with significant AI and digital transformation initiatives underway[1][2]. The company announced a strategic partnership with Google Cloud in March 2023 to modernize digital platforms, supply chain operations, and advanced data analytics across its global network of over 10,000 locations[3]. Under the leadership of Chief Information and Digital Officer Naveen Krishna, hired in 2021 as the first technologist to run GPC's IT department, the company has developed AI-powered tools for inventory management, customer service, and operational efficiency[4]. While GPC's hiring signals show relatively modest AI adoption with only 5.7% of job postings mentioning AI (primarily in non-tech roles like Operations at 20%), the company is implementing a $200 million restructuring initiative by 2026 that includes technology-driven cost savings and operational improvements[5][6].
...

“I had the pleasure of partnering closely with Jak as he launched the GPC Global Technology Center and scaled out the team in Krakow.
...
Working side-by-side with him to develop the new operating model, build value models, and hunt down high-impact Generative AI use cases, I got a front-row seat to what makes Jak such an exceptional leader. What stood out right away was his rigorous focus on real business value. He didn't just look at solutions at the surface level—he dug in to test whether technical decision would drive actual ROI and long-term success for GPC.
...
Jak is that rare kind of executive who can tackle organizational challenges while never losing touch with the technology itself. Beyond the boardroom strategy, I always looked forward to the moments we'd get to "nerd out" over AI model capabilities. We would dive deep into where the models were heading and what it meant for the industry, often reviewing the results of his own hands-on experiments. Because he is willing to deeply understand the tech at a foundational level, his leadership is completely grounded in reality.
...
He balances excitement for the future with practical, sustainable decision-making for today. Jak is an incredible leader, a sharp technologist, and just a genuinely great person to work alongside.”

results.title: Subash Arumugam
highlights:
Lead Engineer - Pkg Software at [Genuine Parts Company](https://www.linkedin.com/company/genuine-parts-company)
...
A seasoned IT professional with over 20 years of experience in supply chain systems, demand forecasting, and performance engineering, I specialize in designing transformative solutions that optimize inventory management, enhance planning accuracy, and streamline replenishment operations. Currently serving as Lead Engineer – Package Software at Genuine Parts Company, I lead initiatives to optimize replenishment and demand forecasting, align technology with business objectives, and deliver measurable operational improvements. My experience includes demand forecasting, and inventory optimization, enabling businesses to achieve accurate planning, reduce stockouts, and minimize excess inventory. With a track record of success in supply chain replenishment systems and performance optimization, I thrive in dynamic environments, driving innovation and cross-functional collaboration to meet complex challenges. Career Highlights: Deep expertise in Manhattan supply chain systems (DFIO, TMS, WMS) with a focus on demand forecasting, inventory optimization, and replenishment strategies. Proven ability to design and implement custom solutions that improve planning precision and streamline inventory flows to meet business goals. Leadership in developing performance testing frameworks and utilizing automation tools to enhance system efficiency, scalability, and reliability. Recognized for delivering exceptional results in agile execution, QA excellence, and system integration, earning accolades such as the Homer Award and Performance Excellence Award. With a passion for leveraging technology to elevate supply chain ecosystems, I am committed to empowering organizations to achieve operational excellence through data-driven decision-making, accurate forecasting, and optimized inventory management.
...
Leading the design, development, and enhancement of DFIO applications, aligning technical solutions with business requirements to optimize supply chain operations. Overseeing demand forecasting and inventory optimization efforts, ensuring accurate replenishment strategies and seamless supply chain integration. Managing production support activities, including monitoring night jobs, identifying and resolving issues, and minimizing disruptions to order processing and fulfillment. Collaborating with business users and cross-functional teams to analyze production challenges, deliver tailored solutions, and recommend system customizations to improve performance and scalability. Driving end-to-end system changes, from defining requirements and creating test cases to implementing configuration updates, defect fixes, and custom modifications in production. Establishing robust UAT and regression testing frameworks, facilitating smooth deployments, and ensuring system reliability. Actively participating in agile processes, including sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and retrospective reviews, while providing regular updates to senior management on project progress and outcomes. Mentoring and coordinating onshore/offshore teams, fostering collaboration, and ensuring the timely delivery of high-quality solutions.

## Job description
...
**The Role**
...
Our Product Safety Data Analytics team is seeking an experienced AI/ML Data Scientist with hands-on experience in the full end to end data science lifecycle for artificial intelligence & machine learning.
...
This role requires programming and statistical techniques to solve complex problems and work within a team framework on new AI/ML solutions.
...
As an AI/ML Data Scientist, you will be responsible for working with our customers to understand their challenges and needs, develop new machine learning solutions, work with ML Ops in a cloud environment, develop proof of concepts for new generative AI solutions and Agentic AI solutions.
**What You’ll Do**
...
* Work with our existing business partners to identify opportunities for new AI/ML solutions to enhance processes and enable our team members to be more efficient
...
* Train new machine learning models to solve complex business problems.
...
* Prototype new AI solutions, including Generative AI, to solve business problems.
...
* Develop new Agentic AI solutions to streamline business process
...
* Ehnance existing model solutions as business and technology continues to evolve
...
* Provide guidance on business problems using statistical methods and can craft ad-hoc reports to share findings and recommendations with business partners.
...
* Build statistical models that depict company-wide trends.
...
* Perform testing and validation of data sets.
...
* Work on and refine storytelling skills to convey
...
**Your Skills & Abilities (Required Qualifications)**
...
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or a related field
...
* 5+ years of experience in machine learning, engineering, data science, or a related field
* Looking for experience in the following:
...
* **Programming & Frameworks**: Python, R, Java, PySpark, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, LangChain, SQL
...
* **Machine Learning & AI**: Large Language Models (LLMs), Generative AI, RAG, Generative AI, Deep learning, Reinforcement Learning, Natural Language Processing (NLP), SVM, XGBoost, Random Forest, Decision Trees, Clustering
...
* **Data Engineering**: Databricks, Hadoop, SQL, Data Pipelines, Data Preprocessing & Feature Engineering
...
* **Cloud & Big Data Platforms: (**Preferred Microsoft Azure (Data Lake, Machine Learning, Databricks), **Nice to Have** (AWS (S3, SageMaker, Bedrock) or Google Cloud Platform (BigQuery, Dataflow, AI Platform) )
...
* **Deployment & MLOps:** **MLflow**, Model Monitoring & Versioning, Docker & Kubernetes, **GitHub**, Jira
...
* **Data Analysis & Visualization**: Tableau, PowerBI, Pandas, NumPy
...
* Proven track record delivering AI/ML solutions to customers that get continued usage and drive value
...
**What Will Give You A Competitive Edge (Preferred qualifications)**
...
* Deep knowledge of GM’s Data Ecosystem
* Deep knowledge of GM’s Cloud Technology Stack for Data Science
* Deep knowledge of Global Product Safety’s SFI Process
* Extensive NLP solutions from business problem statement to deployment and ongoing optimization
* Expertise with Large Language Models solutions from business problem statement to cloud deployment that have provided significant incremental business value
* Experience with generative AI solutions that you have developed and deployed into a production environment that have provided significant incremental business value
